nodes.context: Palestinian Canadian family of gangsters involved in drug trafficking and violence.
Criminal group involved in drug trafficking and feud with Alkhalil family.
Criminal organization active in British Columbia in the 1990s.
Criminal group involved in drug trafficking and conflict with Alkhalil family.
Street gang of which Mahmoud Alkhalil was a member.
Outlaw motorcycle club involved in a shoot-out with Mahmoud Alkhalil.
Mexican drug cartel that supplied cocaine to the Wolfpack Alliance.
Criminal alliance led by Rabih Alkhalil and Larry Amero, involved in cocaine trafficking.
Criminal group controlling the Port of Montreal, member Shane Maloney was part of Wolfpack.
Gang whose boss Suhhveer Dhak was murdered in 2012.

edges.evidence_quote: A long-standing feud with the three Duhre brothers started at the beginning of the century.
edges.context: The Alkhalil family and Duhre brothers have a long-standing feud.
edges.time_period: since the beginning of the century

edges.evidence_quote: The Duhre brothers had once been part of the Punjabi mafia and worked alongside Bindy Johal in the 1990s.
edges.context: The Duhre brothers were formerly part of the Punjabi mafia.

edges.evidence_quote: Naud was working as a drug dealer for the Dhak-Duhre group, and the killing of Khalil started a feud.
edges.context: The Alkhalil family feud with the Dhak-Duhre group started after Khalil's murder.

edges.evidence_quote: Mahmoud Alkhalil was a member of the Independent Soldiers street gang. On 16 August 2003, he was shot during a shoot-out with the Hells Angels on the dance floor of the Loft Six nightclub in Gastown.
edges.context: Mahmoud Alkhalil was killed in a shoot-out with the Hells Angels.

edges.evidence_quote: Nabil Alkhalil is believed to have served as the Alkhalil family's liaison with the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.context: Nabil Alkhalil acted as liaison between the Alkhalil family and the Sinaloa Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: The Wolfpack worked as distributors of cocaine from the Sinaloa Cartel of Mexico, whose leader was Joaquín Guzmán.
edges.context: The Wolfpack Alliance distributed cocaine from the Sinaloa Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: A key member of the Wolfpack was Shane Kenneth Maloney of the West End Gang which controls the Port of Montreal.
edges.context: Shane Maloney of the West End Gang was a key member of the Wolfpack Alliance.

edges.evidence_quote: Starting on 29 June 2021, Amero and Alkhalil were on trial in Vancouver for the 2012 murders of the rival gangsters Sandip Duhre and Suhhveer Dhak
edges.context: Alkhalil family members were tried for murdering members of the rival Dhak-Duhre gang.
